glitch_taxonomy.stutter_freeze: Repeating a 10ms-50ms grain with accelerating rate
glitch_taxonomy.spectral_smear: FFT-based stretching of transients into metallic tails
glitch_taxonomy.bit_reduction: Automating bit-depth from 16 to 4 during high-entropy peaks
glitch_taxonomy.sample_rate_jitter: Simulating clock-sync failure for 'sea-sick' pitch wobbles
glitch_taxonomy.digital_clipping: Intentionally exceeding 0dB on Layer 3 for 'Hard-Tech' bite

data.placement_rule: Glitch must occur on the 4th or 8th bar as a Narrative-Reset.
